# Front Systems Manual Notes

These files contain internal integration notes only. Prefer links and summaries over copying vendor documentation. Mark uncertain behavior as `NEEDS_FRONT_CONFIRMATION`.

Use these notes when an official OpenAPI/Swagger spec is unavailable or incomplete.

Rules:

- Summarize confirmed behavior in plain English.
- Link to official Front sources where possible.
- Include sanitized examples only.
- Do not copy large sections of vendor documentation.
- Do not include credentials, tokens, cookies, private links, or unredacted customer data.
